videos.title: I Dealt 100 Damage to My Own Creature (and it won me the game)  Against the Odds
videos.description:
What are the odds of winning in Edge of Eternities damage by throwing 100 damage at your own creatures with Dawnsire, Sunstar Dreadnought? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/against-the-odds-dawnsire-100-damage-combo-edge-of-eternities-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7254644#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/uIH4o
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/Ywop9

videos.title: When Treasures Kill  Much Abrew
videos.description:
